name: Himalayan Serenity Resort
tagline: Experience the Beauty of the Himalayas
description: Nestled beside the serene lakes and surrounded by the majestic Himalayas, Himalayan Serenity Resort offers luxurious rooms, warm Nepali hospitality, and breathtaking mountain views for a truly unforgettable stay.
longDescription: Nestled beside the serene lakes and surrounded by the majestic Himalayas, Himalayan Serenity Resort offers luxurious rooms, warm Nepali hospitality, and breathtaking mountain views for a truly unforgettable stay.

features: 5-Star Luxury Hotel 🏔️ Mountain View 🌅 Lake View 🏨 Modern Architecture 🌿 Beautiful Garden 🛎️ 24/7 Front Desk 🔒 CCTV Security 🧹 Daily Housekeeping
rooms.description: Experience world-class comfort and exceptional hospitality with a wide range of modern facilities designed for both leisure and business travelers. Our hotel offers elegantly furnished rooms with breathtaking mountain views, complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, Smart TVs, private balconies, and luxurious bathrooms.
